title: Casa Talud
description: A house cut into a hillside, where the retaining wall becomes the principal living surface and the roof returns the slope to the garden. A house cut into a hillside, where the retaining wall becomes the principal living surface and the roof returns the slope to the garden. A house cut into a hillside, where the retaining wall becomes the principal living surface and the roof returns the slope to the garden.
description_short: A house cut into the hillside.
phrases: ["The wall becomes the house.", "Ground as material."]

title: Mercado Cubierto
description: A market hall under a single folded canopy that shades without enclosing, keeping the street air moving through the stalls. A market hall under a single folded canopy that shades without enclosing, keeping the street air moving through the stalls. A market hall under a single folded canopy that shades without enclosing, keeping the street air moving through the stalls.
description_short: One folded canopy over the stalls.One folded canopy over the stalls.One folded canopy over the stalls.

title: Taller Norte
description: A workshop and small foundry organized around a top-lit central bay, with services pushed to a heavy perimeter wall. A workshop and small foundry organized around a top-lit central bay, with services pushed to a heavy perimeter wall. A workshop and small foundry organized around a top-lit central bay, with services pushed to a heavy perimeter wall.
description_short: A workshop around a top-lit bay.
phrases: ["Work needs north light.", "Mass at the edges."]

title: Pabellón de Agua
description: A small exhibition pavilion sited over a reflecting basin, its galleries reached by a sequence of low ramps. A small exhibition pavilion sited over a reflecting basin, its galleries reached by a sequence of low ramps. A small exhibition pavilion sited over a reflecting basin, its galleries reached by a sequence of low ramps.
description_short: A pavilion over a reflecting basin.

title: Edificio Cobre
description: A mixed-use block clad in oxidizing copper, where the patina records the building's exposure to the city over time. A mixed-use block clad in oxidizing copper, where the patina records the building's exposure to the city over time. A mixed-use block clad in oxidizing copper, where the patina records the building's exposure to the city over time.
description_short: A block clad in oxidizing copper.
phrases: ["The patina keeps time.", "The city writes the surface."]

title: Biblioteca de Piedra
description: A neighborhood library built from local stone, with reading rooms that step down toward a shaded courtyard. A neighborhood library built from local stone, with reading rooms that step down toward a shaded courtyard. A neighborhood library built from local stone, with reading rooms that step down toward a shaded courtyard.
phrases: ["Read toward the shade.", "Stone holds the cool."]

title: Casa Patio
description: A coastal house turned inward around a planted patio, trading the view for cross-ventilation and privacy. A coastal house turned inward around a planted patio, trading the view for cross-ventilation and privacy. A coastal house turned inward around a planted patio, trading the view for cross-ventilation and privacy.
phrases: ["Trade the view for air.", "The patio is the room."]

title: Nave Sur
description: A long-span logistics shed whose structure is left exposed as the only architecture, lit by continuous clerestories. A long-span logistics shed whose structure is left exposed as the only architecture, lit by continuous clerestories. A long-span logistics shed whose structure is left exposed as the only architecture, lit by continuous clerestories.
description_short: A shed where structure is the architecture.
phrases: ["Leave the frame exposed.", "Light from the ridge."]

title: Capilla de Luz
description: A chapel where a single oculus tracks the day across a bare concrete shell, the only ornament being the moving light. A chapel where a single oculus tracks the day across a bare concrete shell, the only ornament being the moving light. A chapel where a single oculus tracks the day across a bare concrete shell, the only ornament being the moving light.
description_short: A chapel tracked by a single oculus.
phrases: ["Light is the only ornament.", "The day moves the room."]

title: Oficinas Trama
description: An office interior built as a loose timber lattice, dividing space without sealing it, so light and sound carry through. An office interior built as a loose timber lattice, dividing space without sealing it, so light and sound carry through. An office interior built as a loose timber lattice, dividing space without sealing it, so light and sound carry through.
description_short: An office built as a timber lattice.

title: Puente Mirador
description: A pedestrian bridge that widens at midspan into a small belvedere, giving the crossing a reason to pause. A pedestrian bridge that widens at midspan into a small belvedere, giving the crossing a reason to pause. A pedestrian bridge that widens at midspan into a small belvedere, giving the crossing a reason to pause.
description_short: A bridge that widens into a belvedere.
